# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.192.0/http/server.ts";

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  age: number;
  role: string;
  department: string;
  createdAt: string;
}

interface Product {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  category: string;
  price: number;
  stock: number;
  tags: string[];
}

interface Order {
  id: string;
  userId: string;
  productId: string;
  status: string;
  total: number;
  createdAt: string;
}

async function seedData() {
  const users: User[] = [
    {
      id: "1",
      name: "Alice Johnson",
      email: "alice@example.com",
      age: 28,
      role: "admin",
      department: "IT",
      createdAt: "2024-01-15T10:00:00Z",
    },
    {
      id: "2",
      name: "Bob Smith",
      email: "bob@example.com",
      age: 35,
      role: "user",
      department: "Sales",
      createdAt: "2024-01-16T10:00:00Z",
    },
    {
      id: "3",
      name: "Carol White",
      email: "carol@example.com",
      age: 42,
      role: "user",
      department: "IT",
      createdAt: "2024-01-17T10:00:00Z",
    },
  ];

  const products: Product[] = [
    {
      id: "p1",
      name: "Laptop",
      category: "electronics",
      price: 999,
      stock: 50,
      tags: ["computer", "work"],
    },
    {
      id: "p2",
      name: "Desk Chair",
      category: "furniture",
      price: 299,
      stock: 100,
      tags: ["office", "ergonomic"],
    },
    {
      id: "p3",
      name: "Monitor",
      category: "electronics",
      price: 399,
      stock: 75,
      tags: ["display", "work"],
    },
  ];

  const orders: Order[] = [
    {
      id: "o1",
      userId: "1",
      productId: "p1",
      status: "completed",
      total: 999,
      createdAt: "2024-02-01T10:00:00Z",
    },
    {
      id: "o2",
      userId: "2",
      productId: "p2",
      status: "pending",
      total: 299,
      createdAt: "2024-02-02T10:00:00Z",
    },
    {
      id: "o3",
      userId: "1",
      productId: "p3",
      status: "completed",
      total: 399,
      createdAt: "2024-02-03T10:00:00Z",
    },
  ];

  for (const user of users) {
    await kv.set(["users", user.id], user);
    await kv.set(["users", "by_email", user.email], user);
    await kv.set(["users", "by_role", user.role, user.id], user);
    await kv.set(["users", "by_department", user.department, user.id], user);
  }

  for (const product of products) {
    await kv.set(["products", product.id], product);
    await kv.set(["products", "by_category", product.category, product.id], product);
    for (const tag of product.tags) {
      await kv.set(["products", "by_tag", tag, product.id], product);
    }
  }

  for (const order of orders) {
    await kv.set(["orders", order.id], order);
    await kv.set(["orders", "by_user", order.userId, order.id], order);
    await kv.set(["orders", "by_status", order.status, order.id], order);
    await kv.set(["orders", "by_product", order.productId, order.id], order);
  }
}

async function handleSearch(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const params = url.searchParams;

  const entity = params.get("entity") || "users";
  const filterType = params.get("filterType");
  const filterValue = params.get("filterValue");
  const id = params.get("id");
  const limit = parseInt(params.get("limit") || "100");

  try {
    if (id) {
      const key = [entity, id];
      const result = await kv.get(key);
      if (result.value) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify(result.value), {
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        });
      } else {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Not found" }), {
          status: 404,
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        });
      }
    }

    let keyPrefix: Deno.KvKey;

    if (filterType && filterValue) {
      keyPrefix = [entity, `by_${filterType}`, filterValue];
    } else if (filterType) {
      keyPrefix = [entity, `by_${filterType}`];
    } else {
      keyPrefix = [entity];
    }

    const results = [];
    const entries = kv.list({ prefix: keyPrefix }, { limit });

    for await (const entry of entries) {
      results.push(entry.value);
    }

    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ results, count: results.length }), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: error.message }), {
      status: 500,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }
}

async function handleCreate(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const entity = url.searchParams.get("entity") || "users";

  try {
    const data = await req.json();

    if (!data.id) {
      data.id = crypto.randomUUID();
    }

    await kv.set([entity, data.id], data);

    if (entity === "users") {
      if (data.email) await kv.set([entity, "by_email", data.email], data);
      if (data.role) await kv.set([entity, "by_role", data.role, data.id], data);
      if (data.department) await kv.set([entity, "by_department", data.department, data.id], data);
    } else if (entity === "products") {
      if (data.category) await kv.set([entity, "by_category", data.category, data.id], data);
      if (data.tags && Array.isArray(data.tags)) {
        for (const tag of data.tags) {
          await kv.set([entity, "by_tag", tag, data.id], data);
        }
      }
    } else if (entity === "orders") {
      if (data.userId) await kv.set([entity, "by_user", data.userId, data.id], data);
      if (data.status) await kv.set([entity, "by_status", data.status, data.id], data);
      if (data.productId) await kv.set([entity, "by_product", data.productId, data.id], data);
    }

    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true, data }), {
      status: 201,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: error.message }), {
      status: 400,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }
}

async function handleUpdate(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const entity = url.searchParams.get("entity") || "users";
  const id = url.searchParams.get("id");

  if (!id) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "ID required" }), {
      status: 400,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  try {
    const existing = await kv.get([entity, id]);
    if (!existing.value) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Not found" }), {
        status: 404,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    }

    const updates = await req.json();
    const data = { ...existing.value, ...updates, id };

    await kv.set([entity, id], data);

    if (entity === "users") {
      if (data.email) await kv.set([entity, "by_email", data.email], data);
      if (data.role) await kv.set([entity, "by_role", data.role, data.id], data);
      if (data.department) await kv.set([entity, "by_department", data.department, data.id], data);
    } else if (entity === "products") {
      if (data.category) await kv.set([entity, "by_category", data.category, data.id], data);
      if (data.tags && Array.isArray(data.tags)) {
        for (const tag of data.tags) {
          await kv.set([entity, "by_tag", tag, data.id], data);
        }
      }
    } else if (entity === "orders") {
      if (data.userId) await kv.set([entity, "by_user", data.userId, data.id], data);
      if (data.status) await kv.set([entity, "by_status", data.status, data.id], data);
      if (data.productId) await kv.set([entity, "by_product", data.productId, data.id], data);
    }

    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true, data }), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: error.message }), {
      status: 400,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }
}

async function handleDelete(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const entity = url.searchParams.get("entity") || "users";
  const id = url.searchParams.get("id");

  if (!id) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "ID required" }), {
      status: 400,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  try {
    const existing = await kv.get([entity, id]);
    if (!existing.value) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Not found" }), {
        status: 404,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    }

    const data: any = existing.value;

    await kv.delete([entity, id]);

    if (entity === "users") {
      if (data.email) await kv.delete([entity, "by_email", data.email]);
      if (data.role) await kv.delete([entity, "by_role", data.role, data.id]);
      if (data.department) await kv.delete([entity, "by_department", data.department, data.id]);
    } else if (entity === "products") {
      if (data.category) await kv.delete([entity, "by_category", data.category, data.id]);
      if (data.tags && Array.isArray(data.tags)) {
        for (const tag of data.tags) {
          await kv.delete([entity, "by_tag", tag, data.id]);
        }
      }
    } else if (entity === "orders") {
      if (data.userId) await kv.delete([entity, "by_user", data.userId, data.id]);
      if (data.status) await kv.delete([entity, "by_status", data.status, data.id]);
      if (data.productId) await kv.delete([entity, "by_product", data.productId, data.id]);
    }

    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true }), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: error.message }), {
      status: 500,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }
}

async function handleAdvancedSearch(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const params = url.searchParams;

  const entity = params.get("entity") || "users";
  const filters = params.get("filters");

  if (!filters) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Filters required" }), {
      status: 400,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  try {
    const filterArray = filters.split(",");
    const results = new Map();

    for (const filter of filterArray) {
      const [type, value] = filter.split(":");
      if (!type || !value) continue;

      const keyPrefix = [entity, `by_${type}`, value];
      const entries = kv.list({ prefix: keyPrefix });

      for await (const entry of entries) {
        const data: any = entry.value;
        results.set(data.id, data);
      }
    }

    const finalResults = Array.from(results.values());

    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ results: finalResults, count: finalResults.length }), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: error.message }), {
      status: 500,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }
}

async function handleSeed(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  try {
    await seedData();
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: "Data seeded successfully" }), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: error.message }), {
      status: 500,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }
}

async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const path = url.pathname;
  const method = req.method;

  if (path === "/" && method === "GET") {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({
      message: "Deno KV API",
      endpoints: {
        "GET /search": "Search entities with filters",
        "GET /advanced-search": "Advanced search with multiple filters",
        "POST /create": "Create new entity",
        "PUT /update": "Update existing entity",
        "DELETE /delete": "Delete entity",
        "POST /seed": "Seed sample data"
      }
    }), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  if (path === "/search" && method === "GET") {
    return await handleSearch(req);
  }

  if (path === "/advanced-search" && method === "GET") {
    return await handleAdvancedSearch(req);
  }

  if (path === "/create" && method === "POST") {
    return await handleCreate(req);
  }

  if (path === "/update" && method === "PUT") {
    return await handleUpdate(req);
  }

  if (path === "/delete" && method === "DELETE") {
    return await handleDelete(req);
  }

  if (path === "/seed" && method === "POST") {
    return await handleSeed(req);
  }

  return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Not found" }), {
    status: 404,
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

serve(handler);
